{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sonographer",
  "description": "Oyomesi Specialist Hospital is a leading healthcare institution committed to delivering high-quality, patient-centered medical care. Located in Ibadan, Oyo State, we offer a wide range of specialized services across various medical fields, including general medicine, diagnostics, surgery, maternal and child health, and emergency care.

With a team of dedicated healthcare professionals and state-of-the-art medical equipment, we are focused on improving health outcomes through excellence in clinical practice, compassionate service, and continuous innovation. Our hospital operates with the highest standards of professionalism, ethics, and safety, ensuring that every patient receives timely and effective treatment in a comfortable environment.

At Oyomesi Specialist Hospital, we believe that our staff are our greatest asset. We are committed to creating a supportive and growth-oriented workplace where professionals can thrive, contribute meaningfully, and advance in their careers.

Join us in our mission to provide accessible, reliable, and top-quality healthcare to the community.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sonographer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Oyomesi Specialist Hospital is currently hiring a Licensed and Experienced Sonographer to join our medical team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for conducting high-quality ultrasound examinations, assisting in accurate diagnosis, and maintaining a high standard of patient care.


Key Responsibilities


	Perform a variety of ultrasound procedures (e.g., abdominal, obstetric, vascular, pelvic, etc.) in accordance with physician instructions.
	Operate ultrasound equipment safely and effectively to capture accurate images.
	Analyze sonographic findings and collaborate with physicians to assist in diagnosis.
	Prepare and position patients appropriately for examinations, ensuring comfort and privacy.
	Maintain accurate records and ensure timely documentation of procedures and findings.
	Ensure proper care and maintenance of ultrasound equipment.
	Adhere strictly to safety, infection control, and confidentiality standards.


Requirements


	Degree or diploma in Diagnostic Medical Sonography or related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of practical experience in a clinical or hospital setting.
	Must possess a valid license to practice as a Sonographer.
	Proficient in the use of ultrasound equipment and imaging software.
	Strong attention to detail with excellent diagnostic and technical skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work collaboratively in a multidisciplinary team.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;oyomesispecialisthospitals@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-31",

  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

Sonographer Job at Oyomesi Specialist Hospital




        
    

        
        Oyomesi Specialist Hospital is a leading healthcare institution committed to delivering high-quality, patient-centered medical care. Located in Ibadan, Oyo State, we offer a wide range of specialized services across various medical fields, including general medicine, diagnostics, surgery, maternal and child health, and emergency care.

With a team of dedicated healthcare professionals and state-of-the-art medical equipment, we are focused on improving health outcomes through excellence in clinical practice, compassionate service, and continuous innovation. Our hospital operates with the highest standards of professionalism, ethics, and safety, ensuring that every patient receives timely and effective treatment in a comfortable environment.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



At Oyomesi Specialist Hospital, we believe that our staff are our greatest asset. We are committed to creating a supportive and growth-oriented workplace where professionals can thrive, contribute meaningfully, and advance in their careers.

Join us in our mission to provide accessible, reliable, and top-quality healthcare to the community.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sonographer

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Oyomesi Specialist Hospital is currently hiring a Licensed and Experienced Sonographer to join our medical team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for conducting high-quality ultrasound examinations, assisting in accurate diagnosis, and maintaining a high standard of patient care.


Key Responsibilities


	Perform a variety of ultrasound procedures (e.g., abdominal, obstetric, vascular, pelvic, etc.) in accordance with physician instructions.
	Operate ultrasound equipment safely and effectively to capture accurate images.
	Analyze sonographic findings and collaborate with physicians to assist in diagnosis.
	Prepare and position patients appropriately for examinations, ensuring comfort and privacy.
	Maintain accurate records and ensure timely documentation of procedures and findings.
	Ensure proper care and maintenance of ultrasound equipment.
	Adhere strictly to safety, infection control, and confidentiality standards.


Requirements


	Degree or diploma in Diagnostic Medical Sonography or related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of practical experience in a clinical or hospital setting.
	Must possess a valid license to practice as a Sonographer.
	Proficient in the use of ultrasound equipment and imaging software.
	Strong attention to detail with excellent diagnostic and technical skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work collaboratively in a multidisciplinary team.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement Officer",
  "description": "Alliance Hospital and Services Limited&nbsp;&nbsp;is a Multi-Specialty Hospital located at No. 5 Malumfashi Close, Off Emeka Anyaoku Street, Area 11, Garki, F.C.T, Abuja. It was established with the goal of offering world class medical services thereby stopping medical tourism by Nigerians to foreign countries. To achieve this, we have set up a well-equipped hospital and assembled a team of highly motivated work force consisting of experts in different fields of Medicine and Surgery.

Alliance Hospital has most of the Medical and Surgical specialties fully functional. Our drive is quick and qualitative care at the lowest possible cost, while adhering to international best practice. The strategic location of the hospital in the heart of the Federal Capital Territory makes it easily accessible and the serene environment is a much needed elixir for our cherished patients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a&nbsp;results-driven Procurement Officer&nbsp;with proven experience in a hospital or healthcare setting.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage procurement of medical and non-medical supplies
	Liaise with vendors and negotiate favorable terms
	Ensure timely supply of quality items
	Maintain procurement records and compliance with SOPs


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Supply Chain, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 2&ndash;4 years of experience in hospital procurement
	Strong negotiation and vendor management skills
	Knowledge of medical consumables is essential


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter&nbsp;to:&nbsp;hrdept@alliancehospitalabj.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Procurement Officer Application&rdquo;as the subject of the email.",

Procurement Officer Job at Alliance Hospital and Services Limited




        
    

        
        Alliance Hospital and Services Limited  is a Multi-Specialty Hospital located at No. 5 Malumfashi Close, Off Emeka Anyaoku Street, Area 11, Garki, F.C.T, Abuja. It was established with the goal of offering world class medical services thereby stopping medical tourism by Nigerians to foreign countries. To achieve this, we have set up a well-equipped hospital and assembled a team of highly motivated work force consisting of experts in different fields of Medicine and Surgery.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Alliance Hospital has most of the Medical and Surgical specialties fully functional. Our drive is quick and qualitative care at the lowest possible cost, while adhering to international best practice. The strategic location of the hospital in the heart of the Federal Capital Territory makes it easily accessible and the serene environment is a much needed elixir for our cherished patients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a results-driven Procurement Officer with proven experience in a hospital or healthcare setting.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage procurement of medical and non-medical supplies
	Liaise with vendors and negotiate favorable terms
	Ensure timely supply of quality items
	Maintain procurement records and compliance with SOPs


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 2–4 years of experience in hospital procurement
	Strong negotiation and vendor management skills
	Knowledge of medical consumables is essential


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to: [email protected] using “Procurement Officer Application”as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

	We are specifically looking for candidates who have already operated at a senior HR level within fintech or a closely regulated financial services environment.

Head, Human Resources (Fintech Experience Mandatory) Job at Oconsulting Limited




        
    

        
        Oconsulting Limited - Our client in the fintech space is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head, Human Resources (Fintech Experience Mandatory)

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Our client is looking to hire a Head, Human Resources to lead its people function at a strategic level. This is a high-impact leadership role.
	We are specifically looking for candidates who have already operated at a senior HR level within fintech or a closely regulated financial services environment.


Responsibilities
What you'll Own:


	Full HR leadership: strategy, structure, and execution
	Building and scaling HR systems for a growth-stage fintech company
	Talent architecture: hiring, retention, succession, and workforce planning
	Performance management frameworks and accountability structures
	Culture design aligned with business performance and regulatory expectations
	Compliance, governance, and risk management across the employee lifecycle
	Direct partnership with executive leadership on organizational decisions


Requirements


	7+ years of progressive HR experience, with clear fintech or financial services exposure
	Prior experience operating at Head of HR / HR Lead level
	Demonstrated experience in scaling teams and building HR systems from the ground up
	Strong commercial awareness, you understand HR as a business driver, not just a support function
	Ability to operate in a fast-paced, high-accountability environment
	Executive presence, sound judgment, and the confidence to challenge leadership when necessary
	Gender: Female.


Salary
Open (Negotiable).    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Development Manager (Energy Solutions)",
  "description": "SAEK is an independent power and energy consultancy providing specialist technical advisory, power system studies, and engineering assurance services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager (Energy Solutions)

Job Location:&nbsp;Nigeria (field-based role)
Employment Type: Contract

Job Description


	We are looking for a motivated Business Development Manager to drive growth by identifying new business opportunities, engaging clients, and supporting the development of energy projects across Nigeria.
	The role involves both field and client-facing activities, with a focus on building relationships and generating new business.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities
	Engage with potential clients and build relationships
	Conduct field visits to meet prospective customers
	Understand client needs and recommend suitable solutions
	Support preparation and presentation of proposals
	Follow up on leads and manage ongoing client interactions
	Maintain a pipeline of prospects and opportunities


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Engineering, Business Administration, Markerting or a related field
	2&ndash;5 years of experience in business development, sales, or a related role
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and meet targets
	Comfortable with field-based work and client engagement


Preferred:


	Experience in energy, engineering, or construction sectors
	Existing network of business contacts
	Basic understanding of energy or infrastructure projects


What We&rsquo;re Looking For


	Self-driven and proactive individual
	Strong relationship-building skills
	Results-oriented mindset


Compensation


	Competitive base salary
	Performance-based commission


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a short introduction to:&nbsp;jobs@saekenergy.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Business Development Manager (Energy Solutions) Job at SAEK




        
    

        
        SAEK is an independent power and energy consultancy providing specialist technical advisory, power system studies, and engineering assurance services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager (Energy Solutions)

Job Location: Nigeria (field-based role)
Employment Type: Contract

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a motivated Business Development Manager to drive growth by identifying new business opportunities, engaging clients, and supporting the development of energy projects across Nigeria.
	The role involves both field and client-facing activities, with a focus on building relationships and generating new business.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities
	Engage with potential clients and build relationships
	Conduct field visits to meet prospective customers
	Understand client needs and recommend suitable solutions
	Support preparation and presentation of proposals
	Follow up on leads and manage ongoing client interactions
	Maintain a pipeline of prospects and opportunities


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Engineering, Business Administration, Markerting or a related field
	2–5 years of experience in business development, sales, or a related role
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and meet targets
	Comfortable with field-based work and client engagement


Preferred:


	Experience in energy, engineering, or construction sectors
	Existing network of business contacts
	Basic understanding of energy or infrastructure projects


What We’re Looking For


	Self-driven and proactive individual
	Strong relationship-building skills
	Results-oriented mindset


Compensation


	Competitive base salary
	Performance-based commission


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a short introduction to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "CRM Administrator",
  "description": "TransitEdge Solutions Limited is a results-driven digital marketing agency dedicated to helping businesses grow through strategic innovation and data-backed solutions. We specialize in creating impactful digital experiences that enhance brand visibility, drive engagement, and deliver measurable results. By combining creativity with cutting-edge technology, we position our clients ahead of the competition in an ever-evolving digital landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: CRM Administrator

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;

Description


	We&rsquo;re looking for a highly organized and collaborative CRM Administrator to join our Revenue Operations Team.
	As a CRM Administrator, you will manage and enhance our CRM system&rsquo;s functionality, work closely with various team members to understand business needs, and implement solutions. Your role is vital in maintaining system integrity, enhancing user experience, and ensuring the delivery of key insights to drive business decisions.
	If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and are passionate about improving operations through technology, we&rsquo;d love to hear from you.


Responsibilities


	Understand the commercial operation, challenges, and objectives of each team; improve their operation through CRM administration and consultation.
	Provide system administration support for the CRM, focusing on user permissions, custom objects, workflows, and profiles.
	Create, manage, and optimize complex workflow rules, data validation, and approval processes.
	Create and manage custom objects, fields, formulas, record types, page layouts, reports, and dashboards.
	Analyze data to provide insights into team operation, effectiveness, and productivity.
	Work closely with other team members to capture business requirements and implement CRM solutions.
	Coordinate and support integrations with third-party apps, plugins, and tools.
	Support daily troubleshooting, bug fixing, user adoption, training, and documentation.
	Identify and resolve data anomalies, maintaining high data integrity.


Requirements and skills


	Experience working directly with sales teams and implementing their requirements in the CRM system.
	Ability to administer and configure a CRM system (custom objects, workflows, permissions, etc.).
	Familiarity with automating business processes, creating reports/dashboards, and data analysis/modeling.
	Strong communication, collaboration, and problem-solving skills.
	Bonus points for Salesforce.com certification, experience with SOQL/Workbench, or familiarity with integrated tools such as Outreach, Hubspot, or Netsuite.
	Fluency in English, diligence, enthusiasm, and an interest in marketing strategy, content marketing, SEO, HR, recruiting, and tech.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr.transitedgeltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

CRM Administrator Job at TransitEdge Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        TransitEdge Solutions Limited is a results-driven digital marketing agency dedicated to helping businesses grow through strategic innovation and data-backed solutions. We specialize in creating impactful digital experiences that enhance brand visibility, drive engagement, and deliver measurable results. By combining creativity with cutting-edge technology, we position our clients ahead of the competition in an ever-evolving digital landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: CRM Administrator

Job Location: Lagos 

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We’re looking for a highly organized and collaborative CRM Administrator to join our Revenue Operations Team.
	As a CRM Administrator, you will manage and enhance our CRM system’s functionality, work closely with various team members to understand business needs, and implement solutions. Your role is vital in maintaining system integrity, enhancing user experience, and ensuring the delivery of key insights to drive business decisions.
	If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and are passionate about improving operations through technology, we’d love to hear from you.


Responsibilities


	Understand the commercial operation, challenges, and objectives of each team; improve their operation through CRM administration and consultation.
	Provide system administration support for the CRM, focusing on user permissions, custom objects, workflows, and profiles.
	Create, manage, and optimize complex workflow rules, data validation, and approval processes.
	Create and manage custom objects, fields, formulas, record types, page layouts, reports, and dashboards.
	Analyze data to provide insights into team operation, effectiveness, and productivity.
	Work closely with other team members to capture business requirements and implement CRM solutions.
	Coordinate and support integrations with third-party apps, plugins, and tools.
	Support daily troubleshooting, bug fixing, user adoption, training, and documentation.
	Identify and resolve data anomalies, maintaining high data integrity.


Requirements and skills


	Experience working directly with sales teams and implementing their requirements in the CRM system.
	Ability to administer and configure a CRM system (custom objects, workflows, permissions, etc.).
	Familiarity with automating business processes, creating reports/dashboards, and data analysis/modeling.
	Strong communication, collaboration, and problem-solving skills.
	Bonus points for Salesforce.com certification, experience with SOQL/Workbench, or familiarity with integrated tools such as Outreach, Hubspot, or Netsuite.
	Fluency in English, diligence, enthusiasm, and an interest in marketing strategy, content marketing, SEO, HR, recruiting, and tech.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
